hypothesis: If we increase task–tool alignment in scientific LLM agents—by raising task–tool embedding similarity, providing more comprehensive tool/workflow descriptions, or adding a hypothesis generator—then their pass@k, success rate, and average score will improve more than they would from switching the agent scaffold (ReAct vs tool-calling) or base LLM (Claude-3.5 vs GPT-4o), because alignment enables more accurate tool selection and planning.
